title: Mercy Rolls In

sections.label: Intro
lines: O Lord, this world feels lost tonight,
We’re walking roads without Your light.
But I remember days of old,
Your love was fire, a hand to hold.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: The rivers run where You once stood,
The fields don’t yield the way they should.
Your signs are missing, stars are gone,
But I’m still praying, holding on.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: You built the skies, the mountain’s face,
You gave the oceans their first place.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Bring us back, Lord, hear us sing,
Your mercy rolls in like early spring.
Stand up, defend the life You gave,
Your love’s the road that still saves.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: The winds are howling, storms don’t quit,
But I believe You’re in the midst of it.
You split the seas, You tamed the tide,
Now bring Your peace, stay by my side.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Let the past remind our hearts,
The covenant’s never torn apart.
Through every trial, every fall,
Your name’s the truth behind it all.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Bring us back, Lord, hear us sing,
Your mercy rolls in like early spring.
Stand up, defend the life You gave,
Your love’s the road that still saves.

sections.label: Outro
lines: O Lord, this world feels lost tonight,
But Your love’s the way to make it right.

epigraph: They have cast fire into thy sanctuary
styleNote: Rising Fiddle And Harmonies · Stripped Back · Fingerpicking Guitar
